arts.ttl: What Arne Slot did after Alisson and Virgil van Dijk mix-up leads to Liverpool error
arts.sum: Liverpool fell behind at Anfield after an error cost them the opener against Southampton - before goals from Darwin Nunez and Mohamed Salah.

arts.ttl: Salah goes 3rd on Liverpool's all-time scorers list
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is up to third on the list of Liverpool's all-time scorers, scoring his 242nd goal in the Champions League vs. Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive instant referee verdict on controversial 'offside' Southampton goal
arts.sum: Southampton went in front late in the first half thanks to Will Smallbone - but Liverpool felt the goal should not have stood

arts.ttl: 'I'm convinced it's offside' | Dean reacts to Saints goal and Nunez potential red
arts.sum: Mike Dean discusses why he believes Southampton's goal against Liverpool was offside and if Darwin Nunez was lucky to escape a red.

arts.ttl: PSG make Liverpool intention clear as eight changes made and key man dropped from squad
arts.sum: The French giants have made a number of changes for their game on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool Make Contact With £50m-Rated Striker After Gaining an ‘Edge on Arsenal’
arts.sum: Liverpool are interested in RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko, who is also a target for Arsenal. Arne Slot is eager to replace Darwin Nunez.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man United 'learn asking price' for Fulham's assist king ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United allegedly learn that only offers in excess of £40m would be considered by Fulham for Antonee Robinson.

arts.ttl: PSG star Khvicha Kvaratskhelia sends clear message to Liverpool with bold prediction
arts.sum: PSG are looking to seal their place in the Champions League quarter-finals after losing 1-0 to Liverpool in the last-16 first leg, despite dominating much of the tie against Arne Slot's side

arts.ttl: Liverpool move for Man United target “progressing well”, 24-year-old could help Reds get deal done
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to sign the Bournemouth defender Milos Kerkez at the end of the season and they will face competition from Manchester United and Real Madrid. The 21-year-old Hungarian left back has attracted the attention of top clubs with his performance in the Premier League. Liverpool are keen on securing his signature as a […] The post Liverpool move for Man United target “progressing well”, 24-year-old could help Reds get deal done appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Southampton Prediction: Super Salah to shatter another Premier League record?
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has shattered a lot of records during this time as a Liverpool player. He’s added to his haul during the 2024/25 campaign. If this is to be his last season with the Merseyside cl...
